modules.description: Real UAV query tile used in the main VOP pipeline example.
modules.recommended_usage: Drag into the leftmost input position in the paper figure.

modules.description: Real retrieved satellite tile used in the main VOP pipeline example.
modules.recommended_usage: Drag into the gallery/top-1 input position.

modules.description: Combined real input pair module with q/g labels.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as a compact q-g pair block in PPT/Illustrator.

modules.description: Real satellite basemap with the final localization pin position.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the base map before adding extra result annotations.

modules.description: Frozen ViT-Base backbone box with real input thumbnails and real feature maps.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the backbone stage in the method figure.

modules.description: Learnable VOP module outer box with real pairwise feature maps and real posterior.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the central VOP block in the method figure.

modules.description: Sparse verification box with real SP+LG match visual.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the downstream verification stage.

modules.description: Real backbone feature map F_q visualized by PCA projection.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as an individual feature tile or within the backbone box.

modules.description: Real backbone feature map F_g visualized by PCA projection.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as an individual feature tile or within the backbone box.

modules.description: Real rotated query feature map F_{q,rot} after VOP rotation.
modules.recommended_usage: Use before the pairwise fusion stage.

modules.description: Real encoded feature tile [F_g] used inside the VOP pairwise head.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as one of the four pairwise fusion inputs.

modules.description: Real encoded feature tile [F_{q,rot}] used inside the VOP pairwise head.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as one of the four pairwise fusion inputs.

modules.description: Real multiplicative fusion tile [F_g ⊙ F_{q,rot}].
modules.recommended_usage: Use as one of the four pairwise fusion inputs.

modules.description: Real absolute-difference fusion tile [|F_g - F_{q,rot}|].
modules.recommended_usage: Use as one of the four pairwise fusion inputs.

modules.description: Reusable concat / fusion symbol module for the four VOP feature inputs.
modules.source_file: redrawn vector icon matched to the paper palette
modules.recommended_usage: Place between the four feature tiles and the prediction head.

modules.description: Prediction head module showing 1×1 Conv → ReLU → GAP.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the VOP prediction head.

modules.description: Rotation operation block based on the real UAV query tile.
modules.recommended_usage: Use to explain 36 candidate angles and feature rotation.

modules.description: Real posterior distribution on the main sample with highlighted top-4 angles.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the posterior module in the pipeline figure.

modules.description: Real top-k selected angle badges from the main sample.
modules.recommended_usage: Use after the posterior module to denote selected hypotheses.

modules.description: Soft orientation target from the real teacher example.
modules.recommended_usage: Use in training supervision figures.

modules.description: Useful-angle set module cropped from the real mechanism figure.
modules.recommended_usage: Use to explain multimodal useful-angle structure.

modules.description: Pair-confidence weighting curve derived from the real training recipe.
modules.recommended_usage: Use alongside useful-angle supervision in the training section.

modules.description: Real SP+LG match visualization without VOP guidance on the main sample.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the plain sparse baseline visual.

modules.description: Real VOP-guided SP+LG match visualization on the main sample.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the VOP-guided verification visual.

modules.description: Side-by-side comparison between no-VOP sparse matching and VOP-guided matching.
modules.recommended_usage: Use when a compact comparison panel is needed.

modules.description: Real final localization result with the actual projected pin on the satellite tile.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the final result panel.

modules.description: Accuracy-efficiency tradeoff plot from the current paper figure set.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as the standalone quantitative comparison plot.

modules.description: Real teacher localization error curve on the Paper7 pair.
modules.recommended_usage: Use as a supervision / motivation plot.

modules.description: Reusable vectorized UAV top-view icon.
modules.source_file: redrawn vector icon because no local UAV icon asset exists
modules.recommended_usage: Use as a small visual cue in diagrams or legends.

modules.description: Reusable red localization pin icon.
modules.source_file: redrawn vector icon matched to the paper palette
modules.recommended_usage: Use on top of localization maps or result panels.

modules.description: Reusable straight arrow icon.
modules.source_file: redrawn vector icon matched to the paper palette
modules.recommended_usage: Use between adjacent modules in PowerPoint or Illustrator.

modules.description: Reusable rotation / 36-angle icon.
modules.source_file: redrawn vector icon matched to the paper palette
modules.recommended_usage: Use near rotation or candidate-angle annotations.

modules.description: Reusable top-k badge.
modules.recommended_usage: Use to annotate selected hypotheses.

modules.description: Reusable softmax badge.
modules.recommended_usage: Use between the head and the posterior distribution.
